name: Realty Income Corporation
description: Realty Income (NYSE: O), an S&P 500 company, is a leading real estate partner to the world's top companies. Founded in 1969, the firm operates as a full-service real estate capital provider, investing in diversified commercial properties across all 50 U.S. states, the U.K., and Europe. Known as "The Monthly Dividend Company," Realty Income is a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats index, maintaining a long-standing commitment to delivering dependable monthly dividends to its stockholders through a portfolio of high-quality assets leased under long-term net lease agreements.
